title: soldtoshiptobillto_tree_view_toggle_functionality
description: Verify that the Tree/Kanban view toggle buttons on Customer form tabs for Sold To, Ship To, and Bill To addresses correctly switch views and display the appropriate address records in each layout.

title: shiptobillto_selection_on_sales_order_autoselection
description: Test that the ship_to_id and bill_to_id fields on Sales Order and Quotation forms are automatically populated from the customer's stored addresses when available, and that orders can be saved successfully with these selections.

title: shiptobillto_selection_on_sales_order_manual_selection_and_validation
description: Validate that when no matching Ship To or Bill To addresses exist for a customer, the sales order form shows empty fields, allows manual selection of valid addresses, and rejects invalid Ship To or Bill To references with appropriate validation errors.

title: billto_selection_on_invoice_address_resolution
description: Ensure that the bill_to_id field on Invoice forms is correctly populated from the linked sales order or customer context, and that the resolved billing address is displayed accurately for invoice posting.

title: billto_selection_on_invoice_creation_and_validation
description: Verify that creating an invoice with a valid bill_to_id resolves the billing address correctly and allows invoice creation and posting, while attempts to create or update invoices with invalid bill_to_id values are rejected with validation errors.
